teamsChannels.title: Multi-agent Contract Review System
teamsChannels.summary: Sarah Chen prototyping automated contract analysis using Claude APIs. Early results show 40% faster turnaround vs manual review. Team seeking collaborators for compliance module.

teamsChannels.title: Batch API Cost Optimization
teamsChannels.summary: Jamie Rodriguez tested Claude Batch API for compliance analysis pipeline. Results: 65% cost reduction vs real-time. Presenting findings at Data Science Guild standup this week.

teamsChannels.title: RAG with Internal Knowledge Base
teamsChannels.summary: Marcus Wong discussing domain-specific retrieval using Claude + Confluence CQL. 100 docs indexed, performance solid. 6 responses.

teamsChannels.title: Workpaper Generation Automation
teamsChannels.summary: Alex Thompson exploring Claude SDK for automated audit workpaper generation. Balance sheet tie-offs working, expanding to multi-workpaper coordination. 12 replies.
